prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model, a standard approach for short-term stock price forecasting. The point estimate is set to the current price of $82.70, assuming no significant directional drift over the short 7-day period. The confidence intervals are calculated using an assumed annualized volatility of 40%, which is a reasonable estimate for a stock with characteristics similar to NFLX. This volatility is projected over 7 calendar days to determine the standard deviation of log returns. Z-scores corresponding to the 50% (0.674), 80% (1.282), and 90% (1.645) confidence levels are then applied to establish the upper and lower bounds for the predicted price.
